ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_projects_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test suite */,
  "suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the test suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test suite */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the test suite belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test suite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test suite was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test suite */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test suite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES software_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test suite the test case belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test case */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test environment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test data */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the data belongs to */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment the data belongs to */,
  "data" TEXT /* Test data for the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test data was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_data_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_data_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scripts" (
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test script */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the script belongs to */,
  "script" TEXT /* Test script for the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test script was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test script was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test script */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scripts_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scripts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the result belongs to */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment the result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Test result for the test case */,
  "pass_fail" INTEGER /* Pass or fail status of the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test result */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testers" (
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tester */,
  "tester_name" TEXT /* Name of the tester */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tester */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tester was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tester was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tester */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test assignment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the assignment belongs to */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tester the assignment belongs to */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was assigned to the tester */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test assignment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test assignment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES testers ("tester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_execution" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test execution */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the execution belongs to */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment the execution belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test execution */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test execution */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result for the execution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test execution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test execution was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test execution */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the defect belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the defect was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the defect was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the defect */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the defect */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the defect */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the defect is assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test build */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the build belongs to */,
  "build_name" TEXT /* Name of the test build */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date the test build was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test build was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test build was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test build */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_builds_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES software_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_builds_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test coverage metric */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test suite the metric belongs to */,
  "covered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of test cases covered by the test suite */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of test cases in the test suite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test coverage metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test coverage metric was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test coverage metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_coverage_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_coverage_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, test lead, project manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
